title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Select CityWalk - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Select CityWalk - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
